creator: marat@zealot.ksu.ru
text:
after installing sysutils/hal version 0.5.8 I've encoutered a 
	problem with endless scsi bus resets on my adaptec 29160 card 
	after starting hald either via rcNG script or manually, 
	making my system completely useless

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: 	I don't know whether this is my fault or no, but simply trying 
	to start hald leads to endless bus resets on adaptec 29160:

(pass2:ahc0:0:5:0): No or incomplete CDB sent to device.
(pass2:ahc0:0:5:0): Protocol violation in Message-in phase.  Attempting to abort.
(pass2:ahc0:0:5:0): Unexpected busfree in Message-in phase
SEQADDR == 0x173
(da0:ahc0:0:0:0): WRITE(10). CDB: 2a 0 1 86 83 df 0 0 14 0 
(da0:ahc0:0:0:0): CAM Status: SCSI Status Error
(da0:ahc0:0:0:0): SCSI Status: Check Condition
(da0:ahc0:0:0:0): UNIT ATTENTION asc:29,2
(da0:ahc0:0:0:0): Scsi bus reset occurred
(da0:ahc0:0:0:0): Retrying Command (per Sense Data)
ahc0:A:5: no active SCB for reconnecting target - issuing BUS DEVICE RESET
SAVED_SCSIID == 0x57, SAVED_LUN == 0x0, ARG_1 == 0xff ACCUM = 0x80
SEQ_FLAGS == 0xc0, SCBPTR == 0x1e, BTT == 0xff, SINDEX == 0x31
SCSIID == 0x0, SCB_SCSIID == 0x37, SCB_LUN == 0x0, SCB_TAG == 0x68, SCB_CONTROL == 0x50
SCSIBUSL == 0x2, SCSISIGI == 0xc6
SXFRCTL0 == 0x88
SEQCTL == 0x10
